text: Structure of MARPOL Convention layouts are as follows: find the correct one.

options.text: Convention, Protocol I, Protocol II, Protocol 1978, Protocol 1997
Convention, Protocol 1978, Protocol 1997, Protocol I, Protocol II
Protocol 1978, Protocol 1997, Protocol I, Protocol II, Convention
Protocol 1997, Protocol 1978, Protocol I, Protocol II, Convention

explanation: The formal structure of the MARPOL Convention includes the main Convention, Protocol I (Reports on Incidents), Protocol II (Arbitration), and subsequent major amendments including the 1978 Protocol (MARPOL 73/78) and the 1997 Protocol (Annex VI).
